global.description: An ad for PixelForge that features a solid blue background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere. In the top left corner, there is a light blue rounded rectangle that contains the PixelForge logo, which displays the text 'PixelForge' in bold white font. Next to it, in the top right corner, a small yellow rounded rectangle with the word 'BONUS' in bold black font adds a pop of color and draws attention. Below the logo, there are two blue circle icons, each positioned within light blue rounded rectangles, contributing to a minimalistic yet appealing design. In the center of the ad, there is a large, bold white text that reads 'Win epic rewards', which captures the viewer's attention. Below this, in smaller white text, it states 'No ads in first week', providing additional information. At the bottom center of the ad, there is a white rounded rectangle button labeled 'Claim reward' in bold dark gray font. This button has a slight shadow effect, giving it a raised appearance against the blue background, inviting users to take action. The overall layout is structured to guide the viewer's eye from the logo at the top to the main message in the center, culminating in the call to action at the bottom.
global.main_message: Win epic rewards with no ads in the first week

elements.label: Claim Reward Button
elements.description: A white rounded rectangle button located at the bottom center of the ad. The button features the text 'Claim reward' in bold, dark gray font. The button has a slight shadow effect, giving it a raised appearance against the blue background.

elements.label: PixelForge Logo
elements.description: A light blue rounded rectangle containing the text 'PixelForge' in white font, positioned at the top left corner of the ad. To the right, there is a yellow rounded rectangle with the text 'BONUS' in bold black font. The background is a solid blue color.

elements.label: Blue Circle Icon
elements.description: A small blue circle positioned in the top left corner of a light blue rounded rectangle. The rectangle has a slightly darker blue outline. The icon is located within the bounding box defined by the coordinates [35.62, 153.12, 115.62, 224.38] in the PixelForge ad.

elements.label: Blue Circle Icon
elements.description: A small blue circle positioned in the top left corner of a light blue rounded rectangle. The rectangle has a thin white outline and is located within the bounding box defined by the coordinates [133.12, 153.12, 212.5, 224.38]. The overall appearance is simple and minimalistic, contributing to the ad's design.

elements.label: Blue Circle on Light Blue Rectangle
elements.description: A light blue rounded rectangle with a dark blue circle positioned in the top left corner. The rectangle has soft edges and is slightly larger than the circle, creating a simple yet distinct visual element.

elements.label: Blue Circle on Light Blue Rectangle
elements.description: A small dark blue circle positioned in the top left corner of a light blue rounded rectangle. The rectangle has slightly rounded corners and is located within the bounding box specified, contributing to the overall design of the ad.

elements.label: Top Right Corner Element
elements.description: A small yellow rounded rectangle with the text 'BONUS' in white, positioned in the top right corner of the ad. The background is a gradient of blue, with a lighter blue triangle shape extending from the top right.

elements.label: Dark Blue Circle
elements.description: A dark blue circle with a smooth edge, positioned within a grid layout in the upper section of the ad. It is located at coordinates [140.62, 250.62] to [161.88, 271.88], appearing as one of four similar circles in a 2x2 arrangement, with a lighter background contrasting against it.

elements.label: Dark Blue Circle
elements.description: A dark blue circle located within the bounding box coordinates [43.75, 250.62, 65.0, 271.88]. It is positioned towards the center of the box, with a smooth, rounded edge and a solid fill. The circle contrasts with the lighter blue background of the ad.

elements.label: Dark Blue Circle
elements.description: A dark blue circle located within the bounding box at the center of the ad. It is positioned slightly above the middle of the ad, surrounded by a light blue background. The circle has a smooth, rounded shape and is part of a grid layout with other similar circles.

elements.label: Dark Blue Circle
elements.description: A dark blue circle located within the bounding box coordinates [43.75, 160.62, 65.0, 181.88]. The circle is solid and appears prominently against the lighter blue background of the ad, positioned towards the center of the bounding box.

elements.label: Main Reward Text
elements.description: A large, bold, white text that reads 'Win epic rewards' positioned centrally in the lower half of the ad. Below it, there is smaller white text that says 'No ads in first week'. The background is a solid blue color, creating a strong contrast with the text.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards No ads in first week

elements.label: PixelForge Logo
elements.description: A rectangular logo with rounded corners, colored in a light blue shade. The text 'PixelForge' is displayed in white, bold font, centered within the logo. The logo is positioned at the top left corner of the ad, occupying the area defined by the bounding box.

elements.label: Claim Reward Button
elements.description: A white rounded rectangle button located at the bottom center of the ad. The button contains the text 'Claim reward' in bold black font. It has a slight shadow effect, giving it a raised appearance against the blue background.

elements.label: Yellow Bonus Tag
elements.description: A rectangular shape with rounded edges, filled with a bright yellow color. The word 'BONUS' is displayed in bold, black uppercase letters. It is positioned in the top right corner of the ad, slightly overlapping the blue background.

embedding_texts.global_text: The PixelForge ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent logo, enticing reward messages, and a clear call to action.
embedding_texts.elements_text: background: solid blue; main_subject: PixelForge logo, reward text, claim button.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: PixelForge, BONUS, Win epic rewards, No ads in first week, Claim reward
embedding_texts.layout_text: PixelForge logo at top left, BONUS tag at top right, main reward text at center, claim reward button at bottom center.
